text:
Retrieval-Augmented Generation
RAG grounds a language model answer in retrieved source chunks rather than parametric memory.
Each returned chunk carries a stable identifier so that a citation can point back to it.

Deterministic Chunking
The chunker merges peer passages under a shared heading while respecting a fixed token budget.

Token Budget
Because the token budget is fixed in advance the same document always yields the same chunk boundaries on every run which means a golden snapshot can detect any regression in

Token Budget
the chunking behaviour whenever a dependency version changes underneath the lane and shifts how passages are grouped or split apart into separate records.
